name: cto-docsign
description: Cryptool DocSign — secure document sharing, view analytics, and audit-trail e-signatures. Runs standalone at docsign.cryptool.io.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.deploy:pm2: npm run install:all && npm --prefix server run migrate && npm run build && pm2 restart docsign-server || pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
